title: Help Creating name badges from board info
excerpt: I have an event where people require name badges with some other board information.  While I know that I could export information out of Monday.com into a name badge application, it would be nice to be able to do this fr…

posts.author: tBalNL (Tyson Baldwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an event where people require name badges with some other board information. While I know that I could export information out of Monday.com into a name badge application, it would be nice to be able to do this from inside Monday.com at the very least as an integration.

Could anyone point me in that direction, or let me know what solution you used to do what I am looking to do?

I searched Name Badge, and only found 2 results and were nothing like what I am trying to do.
